specvec 0.3.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Package index

Data

Build a specvec object from a long plot-species table and convert cover scales.

specvec()
Build a specvec data object
cover_from_scale()
Convert an abundance column to cover-proportion
register_cover_scale()
Register a cover scale

Species embeddings

Learn species vectors and query their neighbours.

species_embedding()
Species embedding
nearest_species()
Nearest species
species_similarity()
Species similarity
cooc_matrix()
Co-occurrence operator (engine primitive)

Community embeddings

Place plots in the species space and score novelty.

community_embedding()
Community embedding
community_similarity()
Community similarity
community_novelty()
Community novelty

Temporal

Window embeddings by time and track species and communities through a fixed frame.

species_trajectory()
Species trajectory through a fixed embedding frame
community_trajectory()
Community trajectory and novelty over time
as.data.frame(<specvec_trajectory>)
Tidy a species trajectory

Alien integration

Track a neophyte’s distance to the native community over time.

integration_trajectory()
Alien integration trajectory
as.data.frame(<specvec_integration>)
Tidy an integration trajectory

Benchmark

Score embedding methods on your own data.

compare_embeddings() specvec_benchmark()
Benchmark embedding methods

Extend

Register new weightings, factorizations, and method presets.

specvec_methods()
List registered methods
register_weighting()
Register a weighting
register_factorization()
Register a factorization
register_method()
Register a method preset

On this page

Developed by Gilles Colling.
